body._note: CSV uploads use UploadedFiles connector. refreshMode TOTAL_REPLACE replaces all data on each refresh. Field names come from CSV headers.

body.label: Product Catalog Stream
body._note: Other category is for reference/lookup data that doesn't fit Profile or Engagement. No eventDateColumn needed.

body.label: Task Engagement Stream
body._note: CRITICAL: Engagement streams MUST set eventDateColumn to an immutable date field (like CreatedDate). Do NOT use LastModifiedDate — it changes on updates and breaks time-series partitioning. Use d360_smart_datastream to auto-select the best field.

body.label: Account Data Stream
body._note: Profile category streams do NOT need an eventDateColumn. The refreshMode UPSERT means new records are inserted and existing records are updated based on the primary key.
